x-enumeration-literals.name: Declared
x-enumeration-literals.description: Bank creates dividend event, stores key dates (ex-date, record date, pay date)

x-enumeration-literals.name: Pending
x-enumeration-literals.description: Waiting for ex-date or record date, positions not finalized

x-enumeration-literals.name: Ex-Date Reached
x-enumeration-literals.description: Bank updates trading eligibility; clients buying on/after ex-date are not entitled

x-enumeration-literals.name: Record Date Confirmed
x-enumeration-literals.description: Bank snapshots positions; generates entitlement list

x-enumeration-literals.name: Calculated
x-enumeration-literals.description: Bank calculates gross/net dividend per client; tax adjustments applied

x-enumeration-literals.name: Ready for Payment
x-enumeration-literals.description: Payment instructions generated; cash or shares allocated for distribution

x-enumeration-literals.name: Paid
x-enumeration-literals.description: Cash credited or shares allocated to client accounts

x-enumeration-literals.name: Completed
x-enumeration-literals.description: Bank reconciles with custodians; no outstanding items remain

x-enumeration-literals.name: Cancelled
x-enumeration-literals.description: Event cancelled or corrected; reversal adjustments applied
